munit:test.name: post-materials-recommendations-success-200-test
munit:test.description: Verify sub-flow calls PRC API, maps response, and explicitly sets httpStatus to 200
munit:test.doc:name: Post Materials Recommendations Success 200 Test
munit:test.doc:description: Validates that the sub-flow sets httpStatus=200 on successful completion

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Sets the initial payload using a realistic work order request body

munit:payload.value: #[{ Service_Call_ID: "250101-0125", Service_Description: "LK CHECK & EQUIPMENT SURVEY", ProblemDesc: "Third party successfully accepted this PO", CUSTNMBR: "TRADERJOE", ADRSCODE: "TRAD153", Divisions: "SAL-TM", app_notes: [ { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ApptNumber: "0001", SummaryNotes: "Arrived on site checked in with manager told them we were here to do the leak check pm filled out all paperwork no alarms at this time.", OnsiteStartTime: "2025-01-08 10:30:00.000", OnsiteStopTime: "2025-01-08 13:45:00.45", Status: "Complete", FollowupReason: "" }, { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ApptNumber: "0002", SummaryNotes: "ARRIVED AND CHECKED IN. CONTINUED WORKING ON PM. INCOMPLETE", OnsiteStartTime: "2025-01-14 09:15:00.000", OnsiteStopTime: "2025-01-14 14:30:00.30", Status: "FOLLOWUP", FollowupReason: "Labor Only" } ], order_materials: [ { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ITEMNMBR: "", ITEMDESC: "CLEAN MATERIALS,RAGS,MISC", TRXQTY: "1.00000", Billing_Amount: "12.00000", ItemCategory: "" }, { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ITEMNMBR: "", ITEMDESC: "LEAK DETECT,REFRIG SENSOR", TRXQTY: "1.00000", Billing_Amount: "8.00000", ItemCategory: "" } ] }]

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock PRC API Request Sub-Flow
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Mocks the PRC API request sub-flow to return a canned recommendations response

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Mock Recommendations
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Returns a mocked material recommendations response payload

flow-ref.name: post-materials-recommendations-subflow
flow-ref.doc:name: Execute Post Materials Recommendations Sub-Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Invokes the implementation sub-flow under test

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert HTTP Status 200
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies httpStatus is explicitly set to 200 OK, not the APIKit default 201

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Ensures the flow response payload is not null

munit:test.name: post-materials-recommendations-error-propagation-test
munit:test.description: Verify that errors from the PRC API request sub-flow propagate out of the sub-flow
munit:test.doc:name: Post Materials Recommendations Error Propagation Test
munit:test.doc:description: Validates that connectivity errors from the PRC API sub-flow are propagated to the caller

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initializes the Mule event with a realistic work order payload

munit:payload.value: #[{ Service_Call_ID: "250101-0125", Service_Description: "LK CHECK & EQUIPMENT SURVEY", ProblemDesc: "Third party successfully accepted this PO", CUSTNMBR: "TRADERJOE", ADRSCODE: "TRAD153", Divisions: "SAL-TM", app_notes: [ { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ApptNumber: "0001", SummaryNotes: "Arrived on site. Leak check in progress.", OnsiteStartTime: "2025-01-08 10:30:00.000", OnsiteStopTime: "2025-01-08 13:45:00.45", Status: "Complete", FollowupReason: "" } ], order_materials: [ { Service_Call_Id: "250101-0125", ITEMNMBR: "", ITEMDESC: "CLEAN MATERIALS,RAGS,MISC", TRXQTY: "1.00000", Billing_Amount: "12.00000", ItemCategory: "" } ] }]

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock PRC API Sub-Flow to Throw Error
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Mocks the PRC API request sub-flow to simulate a connectivity failure

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Throw Connectivity Error
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Simulates an HTTP connectivity error from the PRC API

flow-ref.name: post-materials-recommendations-subflow
flow-ref.doc:name: Execute Post Materials Recommendations Sub-Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Invokes the sub-flow expecting an error to be propagated

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Error Was Propagated
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Verifies that the connectivity error was propagated from the sub-flow
